texto: I was so sure and Ididn’t want to admit I got it that wrong. And when you’re that sureand end up getting it that wrong, you lose faith in yourself, yourability to make the right decisions about your life.
explicacao: Citação de Kirsten Ashley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I was so sure and Ididn’t want to admit I got it that wrong. And when you’re that sureand end up …” articula reflexao, truth-of-life, wrong em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
